metadata.description: Schema-mock dataset for Polymath Second Brain — captures inputs → concepts → transfers → tasks → reflections → outcomes → community connections.

input_items.content: Professor explained decomposition: breaking complex problems into smaller manageable systems.
public speaking note: tone adjustment captured from meeting.
trading game note: credit card fees captured from reflection.
violin chords note: repetition technique captured from event.
gymnastics grip note: strength structure captured from lecture.
car crash observation note: maintenance importance captured from workshop.
Jeff Bezos email note: AWS birth decision captured from conversation.
Used cash for gift to skip card transaction tax.
argument handling note: positive output technique captured from class.
mind mapping note: knowledge visualization captured from meeting.

pre-mortem note: failure anticipation captured from workshop.
situational intelligence note: context picking captured from conversation.
decomposition note: complex problem breaking captured from personal.

reflection_prompts.question_text: What was the actual outcome vs your plan?
reflection_prompts.response_text: Got distracted by social media. Need better focus.

reflection_prompts.question_text: What did you originally plan to do?
reflection_prompts.response_text: Took 2x estimated time. Will adjust buffers.

reflection_prompts.question_text: Why did X happen differently from your plan?
reflection_prompts.response_text: Completed successfully using the source technique.

reflection_prompts.question_text: What should you do next based on this?
reflection_prompts.response_text: Avoided it — felt overwhelmed. Break into 3 parts.

reflection_prompts.question_text: What made this task hard or avoidable?
reflection_prompts.response_text: Delayed by unexpected meeting. Always buffer 30%.
